items.label: Johto-only challenge: team ≤ Lv 16
items.note: For 'Did Someone Call an Exterminator?' — defeat Bugsy in Set battle style, using only Johto Pokémon that never exceed Lv 16 in battle, and without using any Pack items.

items.label: Recommended counter
items.note: If you didn't pick Cyndaquil, the Dunsparce from earlier still shreds this gym; a Hoothoot and/or Wooper also help and spread out levels.
